programs.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones
programs.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a New York Times journalist and author of best-selling novels, returns to the most famous crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Jones conducts his own investigations and reveals unknown facts that have escaped the attention of investigators and prosecutors.To get a full picture of the crime, he talks to the victims' families, representatives of the justice system and serving convicts.Jones deals with, among others:the famous case of the murder of millionaire Bill McLaughlin, in which charges were brought against football player Erick Naposki, and the controversial trial of infanticide Casey Anthony.

programs.title: Web of Lies 3
programs.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.
